hero.title: The assistant that sees the full encounter — not just the conversation.
hero.subtitle: Aurion captures what you observe, examine, and review on screen. Physical findings, imaging, labs, patient presentation — all grounded in the note. Not reconstructed. Derived from the visit itself.
hero.support: Works with smart glasses, wearables, and devices already in your workflow.

cards.imagingSample: MRI: posterior horn medial meniscus tear…

hero.caption: Observation → examination → imaging → structured note

modes.title: One assistant. Two clinical contexts.
modes.subtitle: Aurion operates in the environment that matches your day — outpatient clinic or operative suite.

clinic.title: Clinic Mode
clinic.headline: Full encounter capture for clinic and outpatient visits.
clinic.body: From consent to approved note, Aurion captures everything: audio, your point of view, and everything on screen. The physical exam. The imaging you review. The lab values you check. All of it in the note — grounded in the visit, not recalled afterward.
bullets: POV visual capture — gait, ROM, exam findings, wound assessment
Screen capture — imaging, labs, EMR reviewed during the visit
Clinician review, edit, and approval before export

ops.title: Ops Mode
ops.headline: Operative and procedural documentation for the OR.
ops.body: Milestone-driven documentation for surgical and procedural workflows. What happened in the room — pre-op, intra-op, post-op — captured and structured for the operative note. Coming to pilot partners first.
bullets: Operative note generation from procedural capture
Pilot partner access — contact us to get on the list

visualCapture.title: Every clinically relevant moment. In the record.
visualCapture.subtitle: Other tools capture the conversation. Aurion captures the full clinical reality — what you see, what you examine, and what you review. The physical exam is not reconstructed from memory. The imaging is not described after the fact. It is all grounded in what actually happened.

pillars.label: Physical Examination
pillars.headline: What you observe is documented as you observe it.
items: Range of motion — values captured visually

pillars.label: Imaging on Screen
pillars.headline: The MRI you review lives in the note.
items: MRI findings reviewed in real time
X-ray comparison documented as it happens
CT findings correlated to clinical exam
Citations linked to exact review moment

pillars.label: Labs & Diagnostics
pillars.headline: Every value you check — automatically structured.
items: Lab values seen on screen extracted via OCR
EMR data accessed during visit integrated

documented: The record is reconstructed after the fact
reality.happensEyebrow: What actually happens in the room
happens: Imaging is reviewed in real time
Clinical decisions are made from what is seen
reality.bottomLine: The record rarely reflects the encounter.

tension.statement: In visual specialties, the most important clinical findings are often never spoken aloud.
examples: A patient's gait reveals the diagnosis before a word is exchanged
Range of motion defines the treatment plan
Tissue quality determines the operative approach
tension.closing: These findings drive decisions. They belong in the record.

steps.title: Consent and start
steps.description: Patient consent confirmed. One action begins full encounter capture.

steps.title: Deliver care
steps.description: Aurion captures in the background. You focus entirely on the patient.

steps.title: Review the note
steps.description: A structured draft grounded in everything that happened — ready in under 60 seconds.

steps.title: Approve and export
steps.description: Review, edit if needed, approve. The note is yours. Raw media is purged.

devices.title: The assistant goes where care happens.
devices.subtitle: Smart glasses, body cameras, and wearables — Aurion works with the device that fits the moment. Hands-free preferred. Always passive. Never in the way.

stats.eyebrow: Why physicians choose Aurion over transcription-only tools

items.title: Passive capture
items.subtitle: Stay with the patient — no mid-visit prompts, no manual tagging, no behaviour change required.

items.title: Multimodal by design
items.subtitle: Audio, point-of-view observation, and on-screen review captured in one continuous flow.

items.title: Specialty-aware output
items.subtitle: Note structure and export that reflects how visual specialties actually document — not generic templates.

coreDifference.title: Grounded in the encounter
coreDifference.lead: Every section of the note traces back to a moment in the visit.
bullets: Linked to what was observed and examined
Linked to what was reviewed on screen
coreDifference.line2: It is derived from the encounter.

presence.title: Stay present in the moments that matter most.
presence.subtitle: Aurion is built so documentation follows the encounter — not the other way around.

trust.title: Your duty of care, reflected in how we build.
trust.lead: Aurion is a documentation tool. We align security and data handling with your institution's requirements before go-live.
badges: Encryption in transit and at rest
You control export and retention policies

pillars.title: Grounded in the visit
pillars.body: Outputs are tied to what was said, observed, and reviewed — so notes reflect the encounter, not a late reconstruction assembled from memory.

pillars.title: Human in the loop
pillars.body: Clinicians review and approve documentation before it leaves Aurion. The assistant supports the record — it does not replace clinical judgment.

pillars.title: Privacy without shortcuts
pillars.body: We design for environments where identifiable imagery and screen content must be handled with discipline — details are discussed during onboarding.

enterprise.title: Volume pricing and enterprise rollout
enterprise.body: For multi-seat clinics and organizations that need onboarding, governance, and export aligned to your policies — we scope together before go-live.

audience.title: Designed for physicians where the exam is visual

finalCta.title: Feel the difference when the note reflects the full encounter.
finalCta.subtitle: Start on the free tier, compare plans, or talk to us about pilot and enterprise rollout.
